description.value:
This angular half-mask is crafted from an unknown metal alloy with a steely gray sheen. From its four glowing eyespots to its pointed horns, the mask's appearance is harsh and synthetic. Despite covering the entire top half of the face, the Functionary's mask doesn't hinder vision or other senses. While wearing the Functionary's mask, you have darkvision and can communicate wirelessly with robots within 60 feet.

Activate—Override 2 (command, concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You cast 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Command] (@Check[will|dc:19|traits:auditory,concentrate,linguistic,manipulate,mental|options:item:spell]) on a creature with the tech trait, ignoring any immunity it may have to mental effects.

publication.title: Starfinder Society Scenario #1-22: Rescue in the Wreck
